search.query: responseStatus.code>300 and responseStatus.code<400 not responseStatus.code:304 |  select diff[1], round((diff[1] - diff[2]) / diff[2] * 100 , 2 ) from (select compare( total , 86400) as diff from( select count(1) as total from log ))

responseStatus.code>300 and responseStatus.code<400 not responseStatus.code:304 | SELECT  
auditID as "事件ID", date_format(from_unixtime(__time__), '%Y-%m-%d %T' )  as "操作时间",  
"responseStatus.code" as "状态码", 
requestURI as "资源路径",
verb as "操作",
 CASE 
 WHEN "user.username" != 'kubernetes-admin' then "user.username"
 WHEN "user.username" = 'kubernetes-admin' and regexp_like("annotations.authorization.k8s.io/reason", 'RoleBinding') then regexp_extract("annotations.authorization.k8s.io/reason", ' to User "([^"]+)"', 1)
 ELSE 'kubernetes-admin' END  
 as "操作账号", 
CASE WHEN json_array_length(sourceIPs) = 1 then json_format(json_array_get(sourceIPs, 0)) ELSE  sourceIPs END
as "源地址", '解决方案' as "解决方案" order by "操作时间" desc  limit 10000
search.tokenQuery:
objectRef.resource : "secrets" AND   verb:get not user.username : "system:apiserver" not user.username:system\:node\:* | SELECT  
auditID as "事件ID", date_format(from_unixtime(__time__), '%Y-%m-%d %T' )  as "操作时间",  
regexp_extract(requestURI, '([^\?]*)', 1) as "保密字典", 
"responseStatus.code" as "状态码", 
 CASE 
 WHEN "user.username" != 'kubernetes-admin' then "user.username"
 WHEN "user.username" = 'kubernetes-admin' and regexp_like("annotations.authorization.k8s.io/reason", 'RoleBinding') then regexp_extract("annotations.authorization.k8s.io/reason", ' to User "([^"]+)"', 1)
 ELSE 'kubernetes-admin' END  
 as "操作账号", 
CASE WHEN json_array_length(sourceIPs) = 1 then json_format(json_array_get(sourceIPs, 0)) ELSE  sourceIPs END
as "源地址" order by "操作时间" desc  limit 10000

search.query: not responseStatus.code : 200 |  select diff[1], round((diff[1] - diff[2]) / diff[2] * 100 , 2 ) from (select compare( total , 86400) as diff from( select count(1) as total from log where "responseStatus.code" = 401 or "responseStatus.code" = 403) )
search.tokenQuery: not responseStatus.code : 200 |  select diff[1], round((diff[1] - diff[2]) / diff[2] * 100 , 2 ) from (select compare( total , 86400) as diff from( select count(1) as total from log where "responseStatus.code" = 401 or "responseStatus.code" = 403) )

search.query: verb : create NOT  user.username: node NOT  user.username: serviceaccount NOT  user.username: apiserver NOT  user.username: kube-scheduler NOT  user.username: kube-controller-manager |  select diff[1], round((diff[1] - diff[2]) / diff[2] * 100 , 2 ) from (select compare( total , 86400) as diff from( select count(1) as total from log ))

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query:
* NOT  user.username: node NOT  user.username: serviceaccount NOT  user.username: apiserver NOT  user.username: kube-scheduler NOT  user.username: kube-controller-manager |  select  CASE 
 WHEN "user.username" != 'kubernetes-admin' then "user.username"
 WHEN "user.username" = 'kubernetes-admin' and regexp_like("annotations.authorization.k8s.io/reason", 'RoleBinding') then regexp_extract("annotations.authorization.k8s.io/reason", ' to User "([^"]+)"', 1)
 ELSE 'kubernetes-admin' END  
 as "操作账号", count(1) as total  from log where regexp_like("user.username", '^[\w\-_]+$') group by "操作账号" HAVING "操作账号" != 'kubernetes-admin'  limit 10000
chartQueries.tokenQuery:
* NOT  user.username: node NOT  user.username: serviceaccount NOT  user.username: apiserver NOT  user.username: kube-scheduler NOT  user.username: kube-controller-manager |  select  CASE 
 WHEN "user.username" != 'kubernetes-admin' then "user.username"
 WHEN "user.username" = 'kubernetes-admin' and regexp_like("annotations.authorization.k8s.io/reason", 'RoleBinding') then regexp_extract("annotations.authorization.k8s.io/reason", ' to User "([^"]+)"', 1)
 ELSE 'kubernetes-admin' END  
 as "操作账号", count(1) as total  from log where regexp_like("user.username", '^[\w\-_]+$') group by "操作账号" HAVING "操作账号" != 'kubernetes-admin'  limit 10000

search.query: verb : delete NOT  user.username: node NOT  user.username: serviceaccount NOT  user.username: apiserver NOT  user.username: kube-scheduler NOT  user.username: kube-controller-manager |  select diff[1], round((diff[1] - diff[2]) / diff[2] * 100 , 2 ) from (select compare( total , 86400) as diff from( select count(1) as total from log ))

* NOT  user.username: node NOT  user.username: serviceaccount NOT  user.username: apiserver NOT  user.username: kube-scheduler NOT  user.username: kube-controller-manager | select "操作账号" from (  select  CASE 
 WHEN "user.username" != 'kubernetes-admin' then "user.username"
 WHEN "user.username" = 'kubernetes-admin' and regexp_like("annotations.authorization.k8s.io/reason", 'RoleBinding') then regexp_extract("annotations.authorization.k8s.io/reason", ' to User "([^"]+)"', 1)
 ELSE 'kubernetes-admin' END  
 as "操作账号", count(1) as total  from log where regexp_like("user.username", '^[\w\-_]+$') group by "操作账号"   HAVING "操作账号" != 'kubernetes-admin' order by total desc  limit 100)
*| select diff[1], round((diff[1] - diff[2]) / diff[2] * 100 , 2 ) from (select compare( total , 86400) as diff from( select count(1) as total from log ) )
search.tokenQuery: *| select diff[1], round((diff[1] - diff[2]) / diff[2] * 100 , 2 ) from (select compare( total , 86400) as diff from( select count(1) as total from log ) )

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query: level: RequestResponse  NOT  user.username: node NOT  user.username: serviceaccount NOT  user.username: apiserver NOT  user.username: kube-scheduler NOT  user.username: kube-controller-manager   | select case when "ActionType" is null then '无' else "ActionType" end as "ActionType", t, count  from ( SELECT time_series(__time__, '1h', '%y-%m-%d %H', '0') as t, verb as ActionType, count(1) as count from log group by t, verb   order by t  limit 10000 )  limit 10000
chartQueries.tokenQuery: level: RequestResponse  NOT  user.username: node NOT  user.username: serviceaccount NOT  user.username: apiserver NOT  user.username: kube-scheduler NOT  user.username: kube-controller-manager   | select case when "ActionType" is null then '无' else "ActionType" end as "ActionType", t, count  from ( SELECT time_series(__time__, '1h', '%y-%m-%d %H', '0') as t, verb as ActionType, count(1) as count from log group by t, verb   order by t  limit 10000 )  limit 10000

search.query:
* | select sum(total) as t, ip_to_country(ip) as country  from (select CASE WHEN json_array_length(sourceIPs) = 1 then json_format(json_array_get(sourceIPs, 0)) ELSE  sourceIPs END
as ip, count(1) as total from log  group by ip having ip_to_domain(ip) != 'intranet' and ip not LIKE '%,%' and not try(is_subnet_of('7.0.0.0/8', ip)) limit 10000 ) group by country limit 10000
search.tokenQuery:
* | select sum(total) as t, ip_to_country(ip) as country  from (select CASE WHEN json_array_length(sourceIPs) = 1 then json_format(json_array_get(sourceIPs, 0)) ELSE  sourceIPs END
as ip, count(1) as total from log  group by ip having ip_to_domain(ip) != 'intranet' limit 10000 ) group by country limit 10000

search.query:
* | select sum(total) as T, ip_to_province(ip) as p  from (select CASE WHEN json_array_length(sourceIPs) = 1 then json_format(json_array_get(sourceIPs, 0)) ELSE  sourceIPs END
as ip, count(1) as total from log  group by ip having ip_to_domain(ip) != 'intranet' and ip not LIKE '%,%' and not try(is_subnet_of('7.0.0.0/8', ip)) limit 10000) group by p  limit 10000
search.tokenQuery:
* | select sum(total) as T, ip_to_province(ip) as p  from (select CASE WHEN json_array_length(sourceIPs) = 1 then json_format(json_array_get(sourceIPs, 0)) ELSE  sourceIPs END
as ip, count(1) as total from log  group by ip having ip_to_domain(ip) != 'intranet'  limit 10000) group by p  limit 10000

search.query:
* | select ip as "源地址", total as "访问次数", round(rate * 100, 2) as "失败率%", failCount as "非法访问次数", CASE when security_check_ip(ip) = 1 then 'yes' else 'no' end  as "是否高危IP",  ip_to_country(ip) as "国家", ip_to_province(ip) as "省", ip_to_city(ip) as "市", ip_to_provider(ip) as "运营商" from (select CASE WHEN json_array_length(sourceIPs) = 1 then json_format(json_array_get(sourceIPs, 0)) ELSE  sourceIPs END
as ip, count(1) as total,
sum(CASE WHEN "responseStatus.code" < 400 then 0 
ELSE 1 END) * 1.0 / count(1) as rate,
count_if("responseStatus.code" = 403) as failCount
from log  group by ip limit 10000) where ip_to_domain(ip) != 'intranet' and ip not LIKE '%,%' and not try(is_subnet_of('7.0.0.0/8', ip)) ORDER by "访问次数" desc limit 10000

* | select diff[1], round((diff[1] - diff[2]) / diff[2] * 100 , 2 ) from (select compare( total , 86400) as diff from( select  sum(total) as total  from (select CASE WHEN json_array_length(sourceIPs) = 1 then json_format(json_array_get(sourceIPs, 0)) ELSE  sourceIPs END
as ip, count(1) as total from log  group by ip) where ip_to_domain(ip) != 'intranet'))
search.tokenQuery:
* | select diff[1], round((diff[1] - diff[2]) / diff[2] * 100 , 2 ) from (select compare( total , 86400) as diff from( select  sum(total) as total  from (select CASE WHEN json_array_length(sourceIPs) = 1 then json_format(json_array_get(sourceIPs, 0)) ELSE  sourceIPs END
as ip, count(1) as total from log  group by ip) where ip_to_domain(ip) != 'intranet'))

search.query: verb : create or verb : patch or verb : update or verb : put or verb:delete | select DISTINCT ( case when "objectRef.namespace" is null then '__all__' else "objectRef.namespace" end )  as ns  HAVING ns != '__all__'  limit 10000
